title: Syntel India Digital Technologies is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Syntel India Digital Technologies is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Syntel India Digital Technologies, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Full Stack Developer for our Kolkata operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Syntel India Digital Technologies:
Syntel India Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Syntel India Digital Technologies!
